name: Forest Park School
description: Forest Park School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Crystal Falls, MI. There are 2 indoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Nelson Field
description: Nelson Field is a place to play pickleball in Iron River, MI. There are 3 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Windsor Center
description: Windsor Center is a place to play pickleball in Iron River, MI. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.
